description: Plugin-distributed hooks for edtech-partner-success. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags common PSM anti-patterns in partner-facing artifacts (action items without dates, generic boilerplate, unverified numeric claims, multi-partner names visible in a To: line, health-score status without named signals). Set EDTECH_PS_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
